# robots.txt for AI Deploy
# https://www.robotstxt.org/robotstxt.html

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /internal/

# 限制爬虫访问频率
Crawl-delay: 10

# 禁止特定爬虫
User-agent: AhrefsBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: SemrushBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: MJ12bot
Disallow: /

User-agent: DotBot
Disallow: /

# Sitemap
Sitemap: https://your-domain.com/sitemap.xml
